content.problemStatement:
You have an integer NNN, and you want to calculate the number of odd divisors of NNN, and the number of even divisors of NNN.

For example, 222 has 111 odd divisor (which is 111), and 111 even divisor (which is 222). 888 has 111 odd divisor (which is 111) and 333 even divisors (which are 2,4,82, 4, 82,4,8).


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of input contains a single integer NNN.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line 222 integers - first, the number of odd divisors of NNN, and second, the number of even divisors of NNN.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : 111 has only 111 divisor, which is odd.
Test Case 2 : Explained in statement.
